title: RS Config - Challenge Advancements Translations
description: Companion resource pack adding translations for the Repurposed Structures config datapack "RS Config - Challenge Advancements"
body:
Companion resource pack for translations that's not meant to be used on its own.

Summary:
- Fixed inconsistent punctuation
- Removed plurals from descriptions
  - e.g. `Find all new Pyramids!` becomes `Find a new Pyramid`

### Note on translations:
Translations have been made using online tools, so if you find any translation errors please [create an issue](https://github.com/thimblebird/repurposed-structures-configs/issues/new?assignees=thimblebird&labels=translation&projects=&template=translations.md) or [a pull request](https://github.com/thimblebird/repurposed-structures-configs/compare) on GitHub. Thanks! 🐢

### Requirements:
- Any version of [Repurposed Structures for Minecraft 1.20 or 1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=Repurposed+Structures&g=categories:fabric&g=categories:forge&v=1.20&v=1.20.1)
- [RS Config - Challenge Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rs-config-challenge-advancements)
